anchor:
Senior QA Engineer - Selenium/Cypress/JUnit Expert Required

We are seeking a seasoned Senior QA Engineer to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit, demonstrating hands-on proficiency in building robust test frameworks and methodologies.

Responsibilities include:

- Developing and executing comprehensive test suites across multiple applications
- Identifying, documenting, and mitigating defects through detailed investigation using tools such as Bugzilla or JIRA 
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure thorough product validation and quality assurance
- Leading the adoption of continuous integration and delivery practices

Requirements:

- Minimum 7 years of hands-on experience in QA engineering with a proven track record in Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit
- Deep understanding of test automation principles and methodologies
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- Proficient skill set in writing clear, concise, well-documented scripts and documentation
- Strong verbal and written communication abilities to effectively communicate testing procedures and results
- Familiarity with agile methodology and continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) practices

Preferred Skills:

- Knowledge of AWS and DevOps principles for automation environments
- Experience in cloud-based testing with tools such as AWS Lambda or Azure DevOps
- Proficiency in other testing tools like Postman, SoapUI, or Katalon Studio
- Security consciousness and an understanding of secure coding practices related to QA

This is a full-time position based in Austin, TX. We are open to remote candidates on a case-by-case basis, depending on the candidate's availability and company requirements.

If you meet the above criteria and are enthusiastic about contributing to our innovative projects, please submit your resume and cover letter for immediate consideration.
